raw_title: Reform UK tops donations with millions from Thailand-based crypto investor: Report
raw_content: Nigel Farage’s Reform UK reportedly secured a second boost of 3 million British pounds ($4 million) from Thailand-based crypto investor Christopher Harborne
generated_title: 英国改革党获泰国加密投资者400万美元捐款
generated_summary: 英国改革党从泰国加密货币投资者Christopher Harborne处获得300万英镑捐款，成为该党最大单笔政治捐赠。
